name: HMS Kingston Cornelian (FY 121)
events: 23 Oct 1939 HMS Oberon (Lt.Cdr. H.C. Cumberbatch, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Portland with HMS Drangey (Lt. S.C.B. Hickman, RNR) and HMS Kingston Cornelian (Skr. W. Green, RNR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
